source: Motion Creative Benchmarks 2026 (Food & Nutrition vertical) + Farm Thru calibration data
creative_context: Food buyers respond to provenance, transparency, and founder authenticity. Story hooks naming specific farms, farmers, or products outperform generic 'fresh food' claims. Sensory anchoring (taste, texture, origin) drives engagement. Confession hooks ('I used to buy supermarket meat') resonate strongly in this vertical.
